content.title: Fix-Gamebar
content.short_description: Utility to resolve Game Bar recording issues.
content.description: A PowerShell utility designed to resolve Xbox Game Bar recording issues by detecting and terminating stuck BcastDVRUserService processes. The tool provides detailed process analysis with professional UI feedback, automatically cleaning problematic background services that interfere with Windows gaming features. It offers a user-friendly solution for common Game Bar recording failures without requiring administrator privileges.
content.role: I developed a comprehensive PowerShell script that automates the detection and cleanup of problematic BcastDVRUserService processes. I implemented a professional command-line interface with colored output, spinner animations, and detailed process reporting including PID, CPU usage, memory consumption, and start time. I created multiple installation methods including a one-click installer, PowerShell profile integration, and PATH configuration. I also established proper project documentation with README, changelog, contributing guidelines, and security policy.

achievements: Provides a reliable fix for Xbox Game Bar recording issues affecting Windows gamers
Eliminates the need for manual process termination through Task Manager
Works without administrator privileges, improving accessibility
Reduces troubleshooting time from manual investigation to automated one-click solution
Currently at version 1.1.0 with enhanced process detection and professional UI
technologies: Windows process management and svchost service handling
Background job processing for async operations
Command-line interface design with colored output
Git version control and semantic versioning

screenshots: Main script execution output showing process detection and termination
